data.body:
COMPLETION EVIDENCE (supersedes the stale handoff session-log b151, which predates this session's work — at that snapshot fd84 was 'not started' and 6168's change 725 was awaiting votes; both are now landed).

Current verified state (rebar list --parent positive-merry-hake, 2026-07-16):
ALL FIVE CHILD STORIES CLOSED:
- footed-semiacidic-sable (08a8, Finding 4 pinning) — closed, completion-verifier signed.
- indigoid-flirty-catbird (Finding 2 store-compat record) — closed, signed.
- gimmicky-troubling-takin (Finding 5 removed-input tombstones) — closed, signed.
- ducal-statuelike-ladybird (6168, Finding 3 build-once) — closed, completion-verifier CERTIFIED this session.
- clippable-convulsive-eft (fd84, Finding 1 release-source authz) — closed, completion-verifier CERTIFIED this session.

Each child landed on main through the Gerrit two-vote gate (LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1):
- 08a8 -> change 709 (merged). Findings 2/5 stories -> merged in prior sessions (closed+signed = certified against landed HEAD).
- 6168 -> main change 719 (merged) + AC3/AC4 completion-gap follow-up change 725: LLM-Review+1 (rebar-review-bot) AND Verified+1 (rebar-ci-bot, CI run 29459823729), SUBMITTED -> MERGED this session.
- fd84 -> change 729 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/729, commit 687ae04): LLM-Review+1 @ 2026-07-16T01:41:02Z AND Verified+1 @ 2026-07-16T01:43:29Z (CI run 29464320181 all-green), SUBMITTED -> MERGED to main (tip 22d4c788a).

Each child's plan-review advisory dispositions recorded as ticket comments:
- fd84: round-4 PASS, 20 advisories dispositioned (Accept/Reject + rationale) in a comment on clippable-convulsive-eft; Accepted findings reflected in the description before its Gerrit votes; plan-review attestation certified pre-claim.
- 08a8 / 21dd / others: dispositions recorded in their prior sessions (see per-child ticket comments).

fd84 also completed both autonomous verification ACs this session: (a) guard-fire confirmed on the live release.yml — non-main ref run 29464905367 aborted at the ref guard, mismatched-version run 29464912566 aborted at version-lockstep, all build/publish/tag jobs SKIPPED (no side effect); (b) the live pypi environment was configured (required reviewer JoeOakhartNava + main-only branch policy) and re-verified via the env-preflight parser (exit 0). Evidence comments are on clippable-convulsive-eft.
